I'll start by analyzing the two fixes:

**Fix 1**: `Button.variant` type changed - but looking at the actual values used (`"danger"` and `"secondary"`), both values exist in both the old and new type unions. So no code change is needed for this fix - the values are still valid.

**Fix 2**: Icon children to `icon` prop migration for `<Button>`. Looking at the code contexts, the buttons at lines 211 and 215 contain only text children (`{t('Switch and delete')}` and `{t('Cancel')}`), not icon elements. So this fix likely doesn't apply either. But let me read the full file to be sure.

Now let me analyze each fix carefully:

**Fix 1**: `Button.variant` type changed. The values used are `"danger"` (line 211) and `"secondary"` (line 215). Both `"danger"` and `"secondary"` exist in both the old and new type unions. The only change is the addition of `"stateful"` to the union. **No code change needed** — the existing values remain valid.

**Fix 2**: Icon children to `icon` prop migration for `<Button>`. Looking at the actual code:
- Line 211: `<Button variant="danger" onClick={onClickYAMLWarningConfirm}>{t('Switch and delete')}</Button>` — children is text only, no icon.
- Line 215: `<Button variant="secondary" onClick={onClickYAMLWarningCancel}>{t('Cancel')}</Button>` — children is text only, no icon.

Neither Button contains an icon element from `@patternfly/react-icons`. **No code change needed** — there are no icons to migrate to the `icon` prop.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed` | **Already valid (no change needed)** | The values `"danger"` and `"secondary"` used at lines 211 and 215 are present in both the old and new type unions. The type change only added `"stateful"` as a new option. |
| Fix 2 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-button` | **No change needed** | Neither Button (lines 211, 215) contains icon elements — they only have text children (`{t('Switch and delete')}` and `{t('Cancel')}`). The icon-to-prop migration rule does not apply to these instances. |
